title: Word Search
coreIdea: Determine if a word can be formed by sequentially adjacent letters in a grid, where the same cell can't be reused within one path. DFS explores each possible path, backtracking when a path fails to match.
recognitionCues: asks if a target word/path exists via adjacent cells
cells cannot be reused in a single path
approach: For each cell matching the word's first character, start DFS. At each step, mark the cell visited, check the next character against 4-directional neighbors, recurse. If a path fails, backtrack by unmarking the cell and try other directions/starting points.
timeComplexity: O(rows * cols * 4^L) where L is word length
